description_long: This is a modern tactical shotgun with a sleek, angular design and a matte black finish. The body features a prominent Picatinny rail running along the top for mounting optics or accessories. The grip is ergonomic and textured, with visible yellow shells stored in a side saddle integrated into the magazine well. The stock is minimalistic and straight, with a slight extension at the rear for shoulder support. The barrel is long and squared-off, with venting holes along the upper fore-end for heat dissipation. The overall appearance is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, matte black tactical shotgun with a Picatinny rail, ergonomic grip, and visible shell storage. Its angular design and vented barrel give it a robust, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, Picatinny rail, ergonomic grip, and yellow shells in the magazine well.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the squared-off barrel and the alignment of the rail and fore-end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the grip, stock, and shell storage.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the straight stock and the alignment of the barrel and rail.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with venting holes along the upper fore-end
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
